ownerOverrides: High-revenue SKUs continue selling while public copy and buyer flow are cleaned.
B2B is inbound/supporting only unless later chosen.
Airtable moves into the dashboard Supabase migration tonight.

gates.name: Site Gate
gates.summary: Affiliate page, calculator/reconstitution flow, high-risk copy, checkout intent, AI files, schema, and Romanian parity still need cleanup.

gates.name: Counsel/Broker Gate
gates.summary: Counsel/customs broker packet and SKU/channel questions need a go/no-go scope.

gates.name: Cash Gate
gates.summary: Actual cash, Zen, crypto, receivables, personal-stock debt, and proof records must be reconciled.

gates.name: Supabase/Dashboard Gate
gates.summary: Airtable, payments, transactions, SKU states, approvals, evidence links, and exceptions move into Supabase/dashboard.

gates.name: SKU Gate
gates.summary: High-revenue SKUs continue, but each needs copy cleanup, COA state, margin status, reorder focus, and counsel flag.

gates.name: Accessories Gate
gates.summary: Accessory marketplace waits for proof, QC, low-risk MVP split, landed cost, and marketplace policy checks.

gates.name: Dragos Gate
gates.summary: Dragos remains in observation mode until cash reconciliation, operating contract, evidence rule, and dummy handoff pass.

tasks.title: Create 48h live-state register
tasks.description: Make one simple status board showing D2C live, ads not running, affiliate/copy/tooling cleanup needed, high-revenue SKUs continue, Dragos collaborator sales not active yet, and accessory marketplace waiting for proof/QC.
tasks.acceptance: Each live/not-live item has owner, due date, proof link, and current state.

tasks.title: Create red/yellow/green gate scoreboard
tasks.description: Maintain daily gate states for Site, Counsel/Broker, Cash, Supabase/Dashboard, SKU, Accessories, and Dragos.
tasks.acceptance: Every gate has state, owner, blocker, proof needed, and next action.

tasks.title: Deliver Narcis site P0 packet
tasks.description: Exact URL/action list for affiliate cleanup, calculator gate, high-revenue SKU copy cleanup, checkout buyer-intent gate, AI/schema/LLM parity, Romanian parity, and acceptance checks.
tasks.acceptance: Narcis can work from URL-by-URL instructions without reconstructing the audit.

tasks.title: Prepare counsel and customs broker packet
tasks.description: Package live-state, current claims, channels, SKUs, suppliers, import flow, affiliate status, B2B inbound position, and exact go/no-go questions.
tasks.acceptance: Counsel/broker can answer what can stay live, what must change, and what evidence is required.

tasks.title: Close Dragos cash packet
tasks.description: List actual cash, Zen, crypto, receivables, personal-stock debt, proof screenshots/records, and separate any back-pay discussion from company money owed.
tasks.acceptance: Actual balances and proof match the EUR 4,999.43 cash target and USD 6,931.60 total accountable amount.

tasks.title: Move ledger into dashboard Supabase
tasks.description: Define minimum Supabase dashboard schema for SKU, batch, stock, orders, payments, COA/SDS, approvals, exceptions, pricing, and evidence links.
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard can rebuild current operating state without note parsing.

tasks.title: Sync Airtable and Supabase, update all payments and transactions
tasks.description: Narcis must reconcile Airtable with Supabase/dashboard, then update every payment and transaction including proofs, IDs, expenses, balances, and exception statuses.
tasks.acceptance: Airtable and Supabase agree; no payment or transaction remains only in chat, old notes, or stale dashboard fields.

tasks.title: Rewrite or pause public affiliate pages
tasks.description: Remove recurring 20-35%, 5% override, sub-affiliate recruitment, weekly crypto payout promises, influencer recruitment, passive-income framing, and public earnings calculator.
tasks.acceptance: Affiliate page says paused pending compliance review or private single-tier policy; scans find no override/sub-affiliate/recruit/passive-income claims.

tasks.title: Gate peptide calculator and reconstitution flow
tasks.description: Remove or gate the public peptide calculator/reconstitution flow.
tasks.acceptance: Calculator is 404/noindex/login-gated or only generic lab unit conversion; no syringe units, draw volume, reconstitution, target amount per draw, or presets.

tasks.title: Clean high-revenue/high-risk SKU copy while continuing sales
tasks.description: Keep selling Retatrutide, GLP-1 adjacent, BPC-157, TB-500, Tesamorelin, Tirzepatide, Semaglutida, Melanotan 2, and use-guidance pages while removing benefit/dosing/use claims.
tasks.acceptance: No stop-sale by default; ordering remains aligned with RUO intent.

tasks.title: Add checkout intended-use acknowledgement
tasks.description: Store buyer type, research purpose, no personal/clinical/injection/treatment/resale-with-claims acknowledgement, source tag, and manual-review flags.
tasks.acceptance: Invalid intent creates rejection/manual review and leaves evidence in dashboard.

tasks.title: Produce 6-month budget and reserve allocation
tasks.description: Split legal/customs/QA, peptide OpCo, accessories, owner repayment, Dragos compensation, COA/testing, inventory, ops, AI/data, and contingency.
tasks.acceptance: Budget states what Vic can commit and which reserves are protected.

tasks.title: Create canonical SKU pricing and margin table
tasks.description: Build table with supplier cost, landed cost, public price, margin, discount/promoter/CAC cap, reorder status, counsel flag, and active copy status.
tasks.acceptance: Each SKU has one pricing truth and exception notes.

tasks.title: Build SKU disposition table
tasks.description: Classify every SKU by continue, cleanup, COA needed, margin review, reorder focus, counsel review, or inbound-B2B support.
tasks.acceptance: No SKU status is inferred from memory or chat.

tasks.title: Confirm Vic accessory proof and low-risk MVP split
tasks.description: Collect first order proof and split accessories into low-risk MVP vs legal-gated items.
tasks.acceptance: Proof saved; copy only covers storage, transport, and organization unless stronger evidence exists.

tasks.title: Rewrite AI-readable files and schema from approved copy model
tasks.description: Rewrite visible copy, meta, FAQ schema, JSON-LD, llms.txt, and llms-full.txt from the same approved content model.
tasks.acceptance: Banned-claim scan passes on visible HTML and generated AI/SEO/schema files together.

tasks.title: Preserve COA absence states across all surfaces
tasks.description: Standardize COA states across .com, .ro, schema, support macros, lab-report archive, and LLM files.
tasks.acceptance: Every SKU/batch state is verified report, supplier COA, independent COA, no public COA, failed, or not applicable.

tasks.title: Replace risky commerce CTAs and promo strips
tasks.description: Replace high-risk commerce CTAs and promo strips with research-supply wording.
tasks.acceptance: High-risk pages do not show ORDER NOW, COMANDA ACUM, buy, launch discount, or free-shipping promo near research/claim content.

tasks.title: Rerun Narcis dashboard on canonical Ehsan basis
tasks.description: Dashboard treasury aligns to corrected EUR 5,500 + USD 1,800 Ehsan basis; old ~$6,420 comparison carries the $264.95 offset note if shown.
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard no longer uses stale comparison as current truth.

tasks.title: Clean old Airtable movement types during Supabase migration
tasks.description: Map loss/writeoff, sold, internal use, location, source order, and exception status cleanly into Supabase.
tasks.acceptance: Stale Airtable statuses are not copied blindly.

tasks.title: Write Dragos operating contract and local handoff checklist
tasks.description: Contract covers allowed tasks, cannot-do list, approval triggers, evidence rule, AI boundary, escalation, and no off-ledger/direct cash default.
tasks.acceptance: Dragos cannot interpret observation mode as commercial activation.

tasks.title: Build Dragos observation-mode assets
tasks.description: Create contact-map schema, collaborator qualification rubric, field-feedback template, approved/banned phrases, refusal language, and weekly AI report spec.
tasks.acceptance: Dragos can collect field intelligence before commercial activation; no collaborator code or payout draft is active.

tasks.title: Confirm owner settlement after Dragos cash is known
tasks.description: Document Vic net receivable USD 5,622.92, Pafi USD 537.18, Dragos recovery, back-pay payable, and monthly net-sales percentage separately.
tasks.acceptance: Settlement uses actual Dragos cash data, not assumptions.

tasks.title: Create approval register for commercial and public changes
tasks.description: Track approvals for public copy, price changes, discount codes, supplier orders, import decisions, live messages, refunds/replacements, and marketplace listings.
tasks.acceptance: Every mutating action has approval ID, evidence link, timestamp, and owner.

tasks.title: Create daily export and checksum backup
tasks.description: Export dashboard-critical tables daily and store checksums to detect drift.
tasks.acceptance: Team can prove whether data changed and when.

tasks.title: Integrate Hermes agent into the Telegram group
tasks.description: Narcis integrates the Hermes agent into the shared Telegram group so the team uses one agent for everyone instead of separate assistants or fragmented bot channels.
tasks.acceptance: Hermes is present in the Telegram group, team members know to use that single agent, duplicated bot workflows are retired or marked read-only, and routing/logging rules are documented.

tasks.title: Assign Dan to controlled social media and stiri.peptralabs.ro support
tasks.description: Dan currently handles social media and stiri.peptralabs.ro. Put him into the operating plan for approved social/news execution after the RUO-safe content model is defined.
tasks.acceptance: Dan has a clear content queue, approval rule, banned-claim checklist, Hermes routing, and no public post/news item goes live with dosing, human-use, treatment, medical-benefit, injection, or passive-income claims.

tasks.title: Use Dan for temporary delivery support until Bulgaria stock setup is ready
tasks.description: Dan previously handled deliveries and can cover selected deliveries until the Bulgaria stock/logistics setup is ready.
tasks.acceptance: Any Dan delivery is assigned through the dashboard, tied to a website/order ID, has stock movement and proof recorded, excludes direct/off-ledger cash by default, and includes no product advice or claim-making.

tasks.title: Prepare inbound B2B support packet
tasks.description: No special B2B launch. If someone asks, deliver only with evidence and evaluate how B2B supports RUO positioning.
tasks.acceptance: B2B handling is inbound/supporting only and does not create public campaign risk.

tasks.title: Run dummy website-paid Dragos handoff
tasks.description: Test website order ID to approved payment to local handoff to evidence record to stock impact to weekly AI report row.
tasks.acceptance: No real collaborator activation until dummy flow passes.

tasks.title: Build read-only/draft-first AI agent suite
tasks.description: Daily Ops, Stock, Finance, Compliance, Procurement, Accessories, Ibiza Network, and Weekly Business Reporter operate read-only/draft-first.
tasks.acceptance: All mutating actions require approval ID and idempotency key.

tasks.title: Launch accessories site only after proof and policy gates
tasks.description: Launch accesoriipeptide.ro only after proof, QC, copy, landed-cost, and eMAG/Amazon/Noon policy checks.
tasks.acceptance: Low-risk SKUs first; no unsupported sterility/cold-chain/dosing/injection claims.

tasks.title: Create monthly budget tracking by operating bucket
tasks.description: Track legal/customs/QA, OpCo, accessories, owner repayment, AI/data, marketing, and contingency monthly.
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard shows budget vs actual and reserve impact by bucket.
